title: Performance Marketing Manager
required_skills: 3+ years performance marketing experience (SEM, paid social, paid mobile)
missing_skills: Hands-on paid media platform management (Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager, Apple Search Ads)
Creative strategy development (ad copy, visuals, landing pages)
CAC / ROAS / LTV optimisation in a paid media context
Budget ownership for paid acquisition at scale
core_responsibilities: Plan, execute, and optimise paid media campaigns across Google Ads, Meta, YouTube, Apple Search, LinkedIn
Manage and optimise campaign budgets to hit CAC, ROAS, and LTV targets
Perform in-depth performance analysis: attribution, incrementality, audience segmentation, funnel analysis
Develop and test creative strategies including ad copy, visuals, and landing pages
Collaborate with analytics, product, and growth teams to scale acquisition
culture_keywords: scale what works, kill what doesn't
recommended_emphasis: Attribution modelling and cohort analysis experience — directly matches required analytical skills
A/B testing and experimentation mindset — aligns with the company's bias-toward-experimentation culture
SQL and GA4/Looker Studio proficiency — addresses the data/dashboard requirement
International marketing experience (4+ years, multi-country context) — relevant to AMBOSS's 180+ country footprint
KPI reporting and ROI analysis from Intelligent Power role — demonstrates accountability to acquisition metrics
Cross-channel marketing analytics — bridges to multi-channel paid media scope
English fluency (C1) with German (B1) — meets both the required and the bonus language criteria
